ASDL Markdown Docs¶

This directory holds generated Markdown documentation for ASDL sources. The renderer pulls comment-based docstrings from ASDL YAML files and formats them into module-level reference docs.

Generate docs¶

venv/bin/python scripts/gen_asdl_docs.py \
  examples/libs/sw_matrix/swmatrix_Tgate/swmatrix_Tgate.asdl \
  --out examples/docs/asdl

The generator writes one Markdown file per input source, using the input file stem as the output filename.

Build docs¶

Install the docs requirements (see examples/docs/requirements.txt), then build HTML:

./venv/bin/sphinx-build -b html examples/docs examples/docs/_build/html

ASDL
